siegel.alt: Quality seals: Franke & Bornberg FFF+ excellent, Morgen & Morgen Excellent, LevelNine Excellent

concept.title: HospitalUpgrade Top – Private Patient in Hospital
concept.subtitle: Private room, chief physician treatment, free choice of hospital. No limitation to the physician fee schedule (GOA).
concept.ikkComboText: The IKK bonus rewards health-conscious behavior with over €300 per year (tax-free). At a monthly premium of €11.22 (= €135/year), the bonus more than doubles the coverage of costs. Additionally, the IKK health account reimburses up to €600 per year for preventive care and health services.
besonderheiten: No general waiting period – Instant coverage
No limitation to fee schedule (above 3.5x GOA)

benefits.title: Hospital Supplementary Insurance: Private Patient Status. Without Being Privately Insured.
benefits.subtitle: When you need to go to the hospital, you should focus on recovery — not the budget. With hospital supplementary insurance, you get access to the best doctors and clinics.

spitzenversorgung.title: Top-Tier Medical Care
spitzenversorgung.desc: Access to specialists and state-of-the-art diagnostics.

privatsphaere.title: More Privacy
privatsphaere.desc: Private room instead of shared room. Better recovery.

wartezeiten.title: Shorter Waiting Times
wartezeiten.desc: Faster access to surgeries and treatments.

familienfreundlich.title: Family-Friendly
familienfreundlich.desc: Rooming-in: Parents stay with their children.

einbettzimmer.title: Private Room
einbettzimmer.desc: Maximum privacy and peace. Private room in the Top plan, semi-private room in the Plus plan.

chefarzt.title: Chief Physician Treatment
chefarzt.desc: Private physician treatment by chief physician, specialists and attending physicians. No limitation on the fee schedule.

klinikwahl.title: Free Choice of Hospital
klinikwahl.desc: Any hospital in Germany. Self-selected with statutory insurance care agreement. Including specialist clinics.

keineWartezeit.title: No Waiting Period
keineWartezeit.desc: Immediate insurance coverage from day 1. No general waiting period. Only exception: Deliveries (8 months).

tagegeld.title: Up to €100 Daily Allowance
tagegeld.desc: Substitute hospital daily allowance when forgoing a private room or private physician treatment.

ambulanteOps.title: Outpatient Surgeries
ambulanteOps.desc: Outpatient surgeries performed in hospital are reimbursed. Including admission and discharge examinations.

familienzimmer.title: Family Room & Rooming-In
familienzimmer.desc: Parents stay with their children (under 14). After delivery: Family room for the first time together.

vorNachStationaer.title: Pre- & Post-Inpatient
vorNachStationaer.desc: Pre- and post-inpatient treatments are fully covered. Seamless protection around your hospital stay.

testimonials.title: Real Customers, <highlight>Real Security</highlight>
testimonials.subtitle: Experiences from people who have enjoyed private patient status in hospital.

items.name: Markus H. (52), Hanover
items.text: After my knee surgery, I was in a private room and was personally operated on and cared for by the chief physician. My colleague in the same hospital was in a three-bed room with a junior doctor. The difference is enormous. For €11 a month, one of the best decisions of my life.

items.name: Petra & Jan W. (34), Bremen
items.text: For the birth of our son, we had a family room thanks to HospitalUpgrade. Being able to spend the first nights together as a family in the hospital was priceless. And thanks to the IKK bonus, we effectively don't pay a cent for the insurance.

items.name: Sabine K. (41), Leipzig
items.text: My appendix had to come out suddenly. Thanks to HospitalUpgrade, I immediately had a private room and the chief physician performed the surgery. Of nearly €1,900 in additional costs, the insurance covered over €1,800. Without the supplementary insurance, I would have been in a shared room.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Hospital Supplementary Insurance
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about HospitalUpgrade and the IKK Classic bonus.

items.q: How much does HospitalUpgrade cost per month?
items.a: HospitalUpgrade Top (private room) starts at €11.22 per month without aging provisions. With aging provisions from €33.33. HospitalUpgrade Plus (semi-private room) starts at €8.98. Combined with the IKK Classic bonus (over €300 per year, tax-free), the insurance effectively pays for itself entirely.

items.q: What is the difference between HospitalUpgrade Plus and Top?
items.a: HospitalUpgrade Plus offers a semi-private room and substitute hospital daily allowance of up to €80 per day. HospitalUpgrade Top offers a private room, up to €100 daily allowance per day, and in the Top plan a family room for inpatient delivery (not limited to the cost of a semi-private room). Both plans include chief physician treatment, free choice of hospital and no limitation on the fee schedule.

No. There is no general waiting period. Insurance coverage begins immediately from day 1 with entitlement to all insured benefits. The only exception: For deliveries, there is a waiting period of eight months.

items.q: Are private physician services above the maximum rate also reimbursed?
items.a: Yes, this is a special feature of HospitalUpgrade. Reimbursement is not limited to the 3.5x rate of the physician fee schedule (GOA). Fees exceeding this are also reimbursed. This means: No out-of-pocket costs when choosing your physician.

items.q: How does HospitalUpgrade work together with the IKK Classic bonus?
items.a: The combination makes hospital supplementary insurance effectively free: You pay €11.22 per month (= €135 per year) for HospitalUpgrade Top. The IKK Classic bonus provides over €300 per year tax-free. Additionally, the IKK health account reimburses up to €600 per year. The bonus significantly exceeds the premiums, so you effectively pay €0 and still have private patient status in hospital.

For inpatient delivery, HospitalUpgrade covers private physician services and accommodation. In the Top plan, you get a family room where you can spend the first days together with your partner and newborn. Costs are not limited to the level of a semi-private room.

items.q: Do I get money if I forgo the private room?
items.a: Yes. If you forgo accommodation in a private or semi-private room or private physician treatment during a hospital stay, you receive a substitute hospital daily allowance: up to €100 per day in the Top plan and up to €80 per day in the Plus plan. For children and adolescents up to the age of 16, the daily allowance in the Top plan is up to €50.

No, there is no maximum or minimum entry age. Enrollment is possible at any age. The only requirement is membership in a statutory health insurance fund. Recipients of free medical care (e.g., police officers or soldiers) are excluded.

hero.title: Inpatient Comfort as a Patient Right.
hero.subtitle: How you can obtain private patient status in hospital despite pre-existing conditions or BMI concerns. Financed through your health insurance fund.

unterbringung.title: The Accommodation Situation
unterbringung.subtitle: The difference between standard care and private status is nowhere as noticeable as in the hospital. Secure the environment that optimally supports your recovery.

privatsphaere.title: Privacy & Quiet
privatsphaere.desc: Recovery requires peace. In a private room, you have no unfamiliar visitors, no nighttime disturbances and full discretion for confidential medical discussions.

hotelStandard.title: Hotel Standard
hotelStandard.desc: Private bathroom, premium menu, multimedia equipment and services that make the hospital stay as comfortable as possible.

chefarzt.title: Chief Physician Treatment
chefarzt.desc: Free choice of doctor in the hospital. You are treated not by the on-call junior doctor, but by the specialist of your choice or the chief physician.

kostendeckung.title: Full Cost Coverage
kostendeckung.desc: Reimbursement even beyond the maximum rates of the fee schedule (GOA). No hidden out-of-pocket costs for specialist fees.

wirtschaftlichkeit.title: Cost-Effectiveness Analysis
wirtschaftlichkeit.subtitle: Quality has its price — but through smart combination with bonus programs, it becomes affordable.
wirtschaftlichkeit.bruttoBeitragDesc: A plan without health questions or with simplified assessment for people with pre-existing conditions costs approx. €70 per month.
wirtschaftlichkeit.bonusErstattungDesc: The IKK health bonus reimburses up to €500 per year for private supplementary insurance.
wirtschaftlichkeit.effektivkostenDesc: Your effective out-of-pocket cost drops to approx. €20 per month after bonus offset.
wirtschaftlichkeit.fazit: Premium healthcare becomes affordable for everyone through smart financing.

versorgungsweg.title: Your Path to Private Status
versorgungsweg.subtitle: We distinguish two paths leading to the same goal: The best medical care. Which path is right for you, we clarify in a quick check.

pathA.title: Standard Acceptance
pathA.subtitle: Care Path A
pathA.desc: For applicants without serious pre-existing conditions and with normal BMI. Standard plans with particularly favorable conditions apply here.

pathB.title: Extended Acceptance
pathB.subtitle: Care Path B
pathB.desc: For applicants with pre-existing conditions or elevated BMI. Specialized plans without health questions or with greatly simplified assessment.

cta.title: Don't Wait Until It's an Emergency.
cta.subtitle: Check now without obligation which care path is open to you and how high your personal bonus will be.
